programme.desc: PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: E223
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.title: E471
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E502
programme.desc: HONG KONG PERSPECTIVES: Hong Kong Perspectives is a Cantonese-language programme. Through interviewing people from different walks of life and key figures in major events, the programme provides viewers with an in-depth understanding of Hong Kong. Staying close to public sentiment and targeting hot topics of social concern, it dissects Hong Kong's current affairs and future prospects from political, economic, livelihood, and cultural perspectives, examining them with varying degrees of depth and perspective.

programme.title: E4 - A 300 ton-Journey
programme.desc: Super heavy, super high and super wide. Autoclaves are the names of the metal giants in which aircraft parts are to be produced from a wide variety of materials under extreme pressure and heat. But it is a long and dangerous way to get there. The two autoclaves weigh over 300 tonnes and have to be transported over a distance of 100 kilometres. A challenge that is anything but easy and involves many risks and hurdles. It is a single obstacle course. From overhead cables hanging too low at level crossings, to bridges that cannot withstand the weight, to narrow roads and steep inclines. And all this in miserable weather and slush. It is a battle for centimetres, there's not a second to lose attention, not an obstacle to be overlooked.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

It's a Bird! It's a Fish! It's a Metamorphosis!
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric turns a bird turn into a fish! In order to understand his shape- shifting trick, we learn all about Escher's metamorphosis: the illusion of one animal slowly transforming into another, line by line.

programme.title: Heavy Surgery
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have got one day's experience under their belts. Today a wild boar needs the Junior Vets' help, a tiny dog goes in a massive scanner, and a snotty cow is having heavy surgery.

programme.title: Reflecting on Mirror Writing
programme.desc: Mirror, mirror on the wall, can you read Eric's handwriting at all? In this episode Eric explores mirror writing: a reversed way of writing seen on for instance ambulances, where the word 'AMBULANCE' is often written in a mirrored way.

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: When Darwin brings home a mirror, Kea sees her reflection and falls in love with her new friend.

programme.title: Orca Baby

programme.title: Gala Day
programme.desc: It is Gala day, and the theme is the Frozen Kingdom. The Ice Stars gather together for what promises to be a sensational performance. But as the skaters are getting ready, some shattering news breaks at the rink.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: Communicating without Wires
programme.desc: How come we can't hear people talking next to us when we're in the sea? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of sound. Have hands-on fun by making a basic phone, and get to know Guglielmo Marconi, a physicist and inventor – ‘the father of radio'.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Old Friends
programme.desc: In search of the next clue, the gang meets the eerie shopkeeper, Gregor, and must decide if they should let him in on their treasure hunt. He gives them a history lesson outside of school but expects something in return. As pressure rises, Kelly's secret is exposed.

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives

programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: This special recap revisits the 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn, also known as Koizumi Yakumo. It portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.desc: Morning Newscast

programme.title: Magandang Buhay[Live]
programme.desc: MAGANDANG BUHAY is a talkshow hosted by Karla Estrada, Jolina Magdangal, and Melai Cantiveros.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there. Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim's secret under the pressure of cross examination.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: E3 - The Cowboy Challenge - Go West
programme.desc: Otto Karasch travels to the Wild West for an ambitious challenge: to participate in a cattle drive as a cowboy, undergoing a tough training session.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: E1 - Valentine's Day Murder
programme.desc: A mother of two turns up dead after a house fire but her autopsy reveals death by strangulation.

programme.title: E8 - Strange But True
programme.desc: Who was the child who inspired 'The Exorcist'? A con artist leaves a path of deception and murder. Did hallucinogenic honey win an ancient battle?

programme.desc: As the miners look to find more valuable ground, Shawn must fight the sea's shifting tide, Ken strains his excavator arm when digging hard cobble.

programme.desc: In a modern-day treasure hunt, Matt Paxton and his team gamble on finding rare, potentially valuable items buried inside cluttered, filthy homes.

programme.desc: Parker's season rides on a critical decision on which ground to open next. Doumitt designs a new gold coin, and Parker cashes in a pile of gold.

programme.desc: Mike and Elvis head to sun drenched Portugal where the iconic Mini Moke has earned cult status. It's a car with a very special place in Mike's heart.

programme.desc: Matt hunts for 'Back to the Future' self-lacing sneakers worth $100,000, limited-edition hip-hop tour jackets, and rare Olympic memorabilia.

programme.title: E8 - Parker Comes Calling
programme.desc: Kevin is sent reeling when Parker shows up demanding the money he's owed. Parker discovers he's losing gold from a wash plant on Dominion Creek.

programme.desc: Winter storms are set to rage up from the Southern Ocean with the potential to halt all abalone diving for weeks.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E9 - Livret A, Life Insurance: Where Is Our Money Going?
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or <<sustainable development>>, the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.title: E148 - Grandpa Pig's Boat
programme.desc: Peppa and George go for a ride in Grandpa Pig's boat. Danny Dog and Granddad Dog are also out sailing. Grandpa Pig and Granddad Dog race their boats to see which is fastest.

programme.title: E303 - Pups Save The Soccer Game / Pups Save A Lucky Collar
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger challenges the Adventure Bay team to a soccer match, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol are called in to play. // The Paw Patrol must work as a team to overcome some dirty tricks by Mayor Humdinger and pull out a victory!

programme.title: E205 - Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E1213 - Pups Save The Hum-Sprayer / Pups Save The Hot Springs
programme.desc: When Rubble's cousin Mix comes to town to paint a mural, Humdinger steals the paint and careens through the countryside. // When Mayor Goodway and Mayor Humdinger show up at Jake's new Hot Springs for a soak, three mountain goats chase them away.

programme.title: E221 - The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrel
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E211 - Pups Leave Marshall Home Alone / Pups Save The Deer
programme.desc: With the other pups at parachute training, Marshall must get a group of loose kittens back all by himself. But he has the help of the other pups' packs! // Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a family of deer stuck on slippery ice!

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The love and success story of a self-made jjajangmyeon delivery driver.

programme.title: E525
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: E1 - A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.title: E2 - A Prickly Problem
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

programme.title: E3 - Nobody Likes Visiting the Dentist
programme.desc: Head into surgery with Mara the koala, who needs a life-saving tooth operation, then assess an injured sugar glider with vet Tim. Cheer as rescue officer Elise pulls a flying fox out of a gutter and see nurse Bree’s clutch of python eggs hatch.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E1 - A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.title: E2 - A Prickly Problem
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

programme.title: E3 - Nobody Likes Visiting the Dentist
programme.desc: Head into surgery with Mara the koala, who needs a life-saving tooth operation, then assess an injured sugar glider with vet Tim. Cheer as rescue officer Elise pulls a flying fox out of a gutter and see nurse Bree’s clutch of python eggs hatch.

programme.title: E1 - Deadly Intruders
programme.desc: Dash across southeast Queensland as breeding and snake-catching season ramp up. Watch Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world, while Stu and Liv tangle with a carpet python.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E3 - In the Extreme
programme.desc: Follow a host of sharks with extraordinary abilities that allow them to thrive in the most adverse conditions around the globe. Observe nearly blind Greenland sharks made for life in freezing Arctic waters, and another species that can walk on land.

programme.title: E1 - Leaping Into Life
programme.desc: It’s spring, and the farm is bursting with new life. Watch a ewe give birth to twins, an orphaned Hereford calf struggle to find a surrogate mother, and the top hen nestle down in her maternity coop.

programme.title: E5 - Etosha: The Great White Place
programme.desc: Etosha was once a great lake that dried up and now only fills with water seasonally during the summer rains. Once the Etosha pan is full of water, a myriad of water birds congregate in the shallow lake to breed, most notably Greater and lesser flamingos.

programme.desc: Etosha was once a great lake that dried up and now only fills with water seasonally during the summer rains. Once the Etosha pan is full of water, a myriad of water birds congregate in the shallow lake to breed, most notably Greater and lesser flamingos.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E3 - In the Extreme
programme.desc: Follow a host of sharks with extraordinary abilities that allow them to thrive in the most adverse conditions around the globe. Observe nearly blind Greenland sharks made for life in freezing Arctic waters, and another species that can walk on land.

programme.title: E1 - A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.title: E1 - A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.title: E2 - A Prickly Problem
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

programme.title: E3 - Nobody Likes Visiting the Dentist

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: A private detective goes to a mansion to investigate the death of a renowned crime novelist.

programme.title: For Sama
programme.desc: Amidst the chaos of war-torn Syria, a woman falls in love, marries, and has a daughter. Oscar nominee, Best Documentary

programme.title: Queen Of Crime
programme.desc: Outraged by an extortionate water bill she has no hope of paying, a frustrated housewife becomes a private detective.

programme.title: Only The Brave
programme.desc: In June 2013, 19 members of an elite crew of firefighters lost their lives battling a wildfire in Prescott, Arizona.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E11 - Grilled Cheese Deluxe/Party Pete/Skips Vs. Technology/Country Club/Catching The Wave
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to get a grilled cheese sandwich for Benson while playing a game to see who is the better liar.

programme.title: E131 - The Beast Inside/Prey Or Play/The Bentathlon/Forever Road/Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max make a return to Max's alma-mater but this time it's no homecoming. Dr. Animo has made a scary transformation and found a way to release the very dangerous animal nature of humans - including Max's life-long friend!

programme.title: E127 - Wish Bone/Going Going Gone Viral/The Tortoise Don't Play Fair/Fish Out Of Water/Cat M
programme.desc: Butch finds a wish bone in the garbage and dupes Tom.

programme.title: E1305 - Ghost With The Most/Bucket List/Tv Knight 6/Kryptonite/Thumb War
programme.desc: When the Halloween Spirit is kidnapped, the Titans must team with Beetlejuice to save the holiday.

programme.title: E101 - Caveman/That's My Television
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby want to civilize a caveman so that Benson will let him stay at the park.

programme.title: E78 - Log Date 7-15-2/Steven's Birthday
programme.desc: Steven sneaks a listen to a friend's audio diary.

programme.title: E125 - Room For Ruby/Lion 4: Alternate Ending/Doug Out
programme.desc: Steven's Gem family continues to grow.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E4 - Super Relaxing Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: A travel and wildlife documentary series that brings viewers up close with nature, wildlife, and environmental conservation issues across the Philippines and beyond.

programme.title: Balitanghali
programme.desc: The noontime daily newscast that delivers the hottest news and happenings in the country.

programme.title: My Mother, My Story
programme.desc: Features real-life stories of celebrities about their relationship and experiences with their dearest mothers.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Continuing his Indian Adventure, Alexander Armstrong visits the pink city Jaipur, the Silk City Ramanagara & Bandipur National Park.

programme.title: E2 - Frenchness
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey across Canada, heading to Quebec and Montreal to experience the French Canadian way of life, which includes sampling poutine, Maple syrup and the obsession with ice hockey.

programme.title: E4 - Monster Shark
programme.desc: After fighting a ragged-tooth shark, Cyril's boat is attacked by a bull shark.

programme.title: E11 - Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Ben heads to northern England and stays with host Paul in Lincolnshire onboard his 30-year-old converted military truck. He discovers why Paul traded living in a house for life on the road.

programme.title: E2 - Frenchness

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: Expect a Miracle
programme.desc: Miss Sung has come to Hong Kong to be a teacher, and hopefully moonlight as a model. On the Internet, she starts to talk with 'Blue Moon', a photographer. While attempting to shoot, the two have an argument, and Sung seems to lose her chance at being a model, until a second consideration by Jet leads to a completed shoot. Love between the two begins to bloom, but Jet's stepsister, who is also one of Miss Sung's students, starts to interfere, and may just ruin everything.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Z Storm
programme.desc: This may be the most critical corruption case since ICAC was established for forty years, involving enormous corruption group; include retired senior governor, senior police officer, business millionaire, senior Attorney and so on. Confronting such Tenacious enemies, ICAC's investigators never give up; they use technology, internet and psychological skills to fight back, and meanwhile they try their best to protect themselves from being killed by professional killers...

programme.title: E5 - Avalanche Control
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore Rogers Pass, a favorite among Rocky Mountain skiers. They also learn about avalanche control techniques required to make this once-inaccessible area safe.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E4 - So Ugly
programme.desc: Christian welcomes actor Marc-Andre Grondin, writer Chrystine Brouillet, and chef Jean-Michel Leblond to cook foods considered 'unappetizing.' From offal to snails, they explore unusual flavors.

programme.title: E5 - Avalanche Control
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore Rogers Pass, a favorite among Rocky Mountain skiers. They also learn about avalanche control techniques required to make this once-inaccessible area safe.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E4 - So Ugly
programme.desc: Christian welcomes actor Marc-Andre Grondin, writer Chrystine Brouillet, and chef Jean-Michel Leblond to cook foods considered 'unappetizing.' From offal to snails, they explore unusual flavors.

programme.title: E5 - Avalanche Control
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore Rogers Pass, a favorite among Rocky Mountain skiers. They also learn about avalanche control techniques required to make this once-inaccessible area safe.

programme.title: E9 - The Falquet Brothers, Snow Dreamers
programme.desc: Nicolas and Loris Falquet are at the cutting edge when it comes to freeriding. Directing and producing films about board sports, the brothers are as creative on skis as they are behind the camera. Originally from Lausanne, the brothers made Les Marecottes their playground some twenty years ago.

programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E14 - Claire Vallee
programme.desc: Claire Vallee is the first vegan chef in France and Europe to earn a Michelin star. This title has allowed her to champion her cause: a cuisine of non animal origin. On today's menu: a recipe using edible seaweed with Polynesian influences.

programme.desc: Four years after Jurassic Park, mathematician Ian Malcolm has to venture into a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Beauty Queen: Nina Li: Four Loves
programme.desc: The Cheng sisters, Li-fang and Li-chiung, leave war-torn Shanghai for Hong Kong. Li-chiung is rescued from robbers by Chien Pei-ling who decides to try out her luck in Hong Kong with the Chengs. They join Uncle and Aunt in Hong Kong. And they get along wonderfully with the daughter Cheng Hsiao-chuan. Li-chiung falls in love with Tony and elopes. That casts the first shadows on the friendships. It's Li-fang's turn to fall in love but both times Pei-ling steals her men. Hsiao-chuan meets Robert. A distraught Li-fang takes out a tutoring job in Macao where she falls in love. Pei-ling loves the same man...

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: Fat is a neglected member of 'The King's Guardian'. Kam dynasty uses an excuse to assassinate the Emperor. 'Fat' smells the trouble and go along secretly to protect the Emperor...

programme.title: For Your Heart Only
programme.desc: Disc jockey Piggy Chan, mechanic Sapi and cousin Hayden are good friends. Three of them form a trio - LOVEBURSTERS. Piggy falls in love at first sight with Jane Yu. He tears down all obstacles to win her heart. With the victory, he resumes his inclination to flirt around. His friends and relatives are very upset to see him deserting Jane...

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Showboy may be uneducated and the son of a prostitute. But he has tact and ambition. One night he saves Chinese partisans from the ruling Manchus led by Prince Aobai...

programme.title: Double Tap
programme.desc: The key witness of a famous trial and 6 cops are assassinated. Miu knows Rick is back. Years ago in a shooting contest, Rick and Miu knew they were borne to be the sworn enemies.

programme.title: Four Loves
programme.desc: The Cheng sisters, Li-fang and Li-chiung, leave war-torn Shanghai for Hong Kong. Li-chiung is rescued from robbers by Chien Pei-ling who decides to try out her luck in Hong Kong with the Chengs. They join Uncle and Aunt in Hong Kong. And they get along wonderfully with the daughter Cheng Hsiao-chuan. Li-chiung falls in love with Tony and elopes. That casts the first shadows on the friendships. It's Li-fang's turn to fall in love but both times Pei-ling steals her men. Hsiao-chuan meets Robert. A distraught Li-fang takes out a tutoring job in Macao where she falls in love. Pei-ling loves the same man...

programme.title: Pillow Talk
programme.desc: The uninhibited story of a carefree bachelor and a carefree career girl and the hilarious things that happen when they tangle.

programme.title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
programme.desc: Kabir and Naina become friends on a trip. Kabir leaves to chase his dreams before Naina can share her feelings. They meet again, but his ambitions remain his focus. Release Year: 2013 Director: Ayan Mukherjee

programme.title: Raja Hindustani
programme.desc: Raja, a poor man in India, falls in love with Aarti, a rich girl. Her cruel step-family opposes their love and plots to destroy their marriage despite pretending to accept it. Release Year: 1996 Director: Dharmesh Darshan Awards: 5 Filmfare Awards, 3 Screen Awards.

programme.title: Chal Mere Bhai
programme.desc: This is the story of two brothers, Vicky and Prem Oberoi and how their lives are turned upside down by a girl named Sapna. Release Year: 2000 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Mere Brother Ki Dulhan
programme.desc: A quirky Northern Indian rom-com about Kush seeking a bride for his brother, only to fall for her himself, triggering chaotic, comedic, heartwarming consequences. Release Year: 2011 Director: Ali Abbas Zafar Awards: Stardust Awards- Superstar of Tomorrow Male- Imran Khan

programme.title: Duplicate
programme.desc: A criminal and a chef look alike which helps the former to conduct his illegal activities. Release Year: 1998 Director: Mahesh Bhatt

programme.desc: After a tragedy, Joan treats an old friend, pushing Amy to face her illness. Richard and TJ clash over a reckless tech bro.
